mapper.sql: SELECT ANIMAL_ID animalId , ANIMAL_NAME animalName , SPECIES_NAME speciesId , ZONE_NAME zoneId , NVL(KEEPER_NAME, '없음') keeperId , GENDER , WEIGHT_KG weightKg FROM ANIMAL JOIN SPECIES USING(SPECIES_ID) JOIN ZONE USING(ZONE_ID) LEFT JOIN KEEPER USING(KEEPER_ID)
mapper.select: SELECT ANIMAL_ID animalId , ANIMAL_NAME animalName , SPECIES_NAME speciesId , NVL(KEEPER_NAME, '없음') keeperId , ZONE_NAME zoneId , GENDER , WEIGHT_KG weightKg FROM ANIMAL JOIN SPECIES USING(SPECIES_ID) JOIN ZONE USING(ZONE_ID) LEFT JOIN KEEPER USING(KEEPER_ID) WHERE ANIMAL_ID = #{id}
SELECT ANIMAL_ID , ANIMAL_NAME , SPECIES_ID , ZONE_ID , KEEPER_ID FROM ANIMAL WHERE ANIMAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
